title: Complex pathways from nature relatedness and knowledge to pro-environmental behavior through eco-emotions
authors: Csilla Agoston, Agnes Buvar, Andrea Dúll, Zoltan Abel Szabo, Attila Varga
inclusion_reason: Representative survey of pro-environmental behavior, eco-emotions, knowledge, and intentions; no carbon or fuel tax policy instrument is analyzed.
exclusion_reason: Studies pro-environmental behavior and intention to change, not acceptability or support for any carbon/fuel tax.
